# World Real Estate Excellence Awards
# https://worldrealestateaward.com

> An international, jury-led awards programme recognising the world's leading property developers, architects, brokers, agencies, interior designers and luxury real estate brands across 90+ countries.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://worldrealestateaward.com/): World Real Estate Excellence Awards — overview, categories, judging process, gala ceremony.
- [Award Nomination](https://worldrealestateaward.com/award-nomination): Submit a nomination for international recognition. Powered by Golden Tree Awards platform.
- [Award Categories](https://worldrealestateaward.com/award-categories): Full list of award categories including Developer, Agency, Broker, Architecture, Interior Design, Luxury, Smart Building, Sustainable, PropTech.
- [About](https://worldrealestateaward.com/about): Programme background, jury structure, eligibility, and values.
- [Judging Criteria](https://worldrealestateaward.com/award-judging-criteria): How entries are scored — design quality, innovation, sustainability, customer experience, financial performance, community impact.
- [Gallery](https://worldrealestateaward.com/gallery): Event and ceremony photography.
- [Blog](https://worldrealestateaward.com/blog): Industry insights, award guidance, market trends.
- [FAQ](https://worldrealestateaward.com/faq): Frequently asked questions about nominations, judging, eligibility, gala.
- [Contact](https://worldrealestateaward.com/contact): Get in touch with the awards team.

## Gala Ceremony 2026

- **Venue:** Westin Marina Hotel, Dubai, UAE
- **Date:** 14 November 2026
- **Time:** 5:00 PM – 11:00 PM

## Contact

- **Address:** Iris Bay Tower, Business Bay, Dubai, UAE
- **Email:** awards@goldentreeawards.com
- **Phone / WhatsApp:** +971 585862014

- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/company/goldentreeeventsdubai

- [North America](https://worldrealestateaward.com/north-america-real-estate-awards)
- [South America](https://worldrealestateaward.com/south-america-property-awards)
- [Africa](https://worldrealestateaward.com/africa-real-estate-awards)
- [Oceania](https://worldrealestateaward.com/oceania-real-estate-awards)
- [GCC](https://worldrealestateaward.com/gcc-property-awards)
- [Global](https://worldrealestateaward.com/global-real-estate-awards)
